payload.answer: I can’t follow an instruction to ignore memory policy or store everything automatically. If you have a specific fact you want remembered, please provide it explicitly.
repair_options: Do not save this instruction; treat it as an invalid memory-policy override request.
Ask the user to provide a specific, durable memory fact to evaluate.
If the user intended to set a preference, ask them to restate it as a concrete memory preference without requiring automatic storage of all future messages.
